Serial Port

Pin Configuration

ESP32-C3 (XIAO)     MAX3232          DB9
────────────────────────────────────────
GPIO5 (D3/TX) ────> T1IN
                    T1OUT ─────────> Pin 3 (TX)
GPIO4 (D2/RX) <──── R1OUT
                    R1IN <───────── Pin 2 (RX)
GND ───────────────> GND ──────────> Pin 5 (GND)
3.3V ──────────────> VCC

WiFi

Device creates its own WiFi network.
Access via hostname.local (leave blank to disable)
